title: CS-Mark 12 holoprojector

The '''CS-Mark 12''' was a [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]] unit produced by [[Plescinia Entertainments/Legends|Plescinia Entertainments]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. This unit was commonly installed aboard [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] when the vessels were modified for use in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|starfleet]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Design==
[[File:Holoprojector_-_Home_One.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Projected plan of attack against the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].]]
The CS-Mark 12 [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] [[Holoprojector/Legends|projection system]] was manufactured by [[Plescinia Entertainments/Legends|Plescinia Entertainments]].<ref name="EGWT" /> It measured 2.8 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in diameter,<ref name="NEGWT" /> and could project [[Hologram/Legends|holograms]] up to five meters. The CS-Mark 12 was initially designed for public presentations,<ref name="EGWT" /> but the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] installed one of the units aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Home One/Legends|Home One]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="RotJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> Data was received by the unit via input slots that could accept [[Datacard/Legends|data disks]], [[datadot]]s, and other storage devices, as well as through direct feeds from other [[Computer/Legends|computers]] or [[Droid/Legends|droids]].<ref name="EGWT" /> 

Operator's panels were set into the perimeter of the unit, which allowed users to control audio level, aspect ratio, playback settings,<ref name="NEGWT" /> projection size and rotational speed.<ref name="EGWT" /> A full editing suite was also part of the CS-Mark 12, allowing operators to modify the holographic image to edit and enhance the images. Using this editing feature, Alliance [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] highlighted specific features and targets on the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]], including the proposed [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] flight attack plan.<ref name="NEGWT" /> An alternative flat-screen data display was also incorporated into the CS-Mark 12 which could be used to display two-dimensional images.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
Rebel technicians used a CS-Mark 12 to plot out the projected plan of attack against the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The presentation, held aboard [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']] in the [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]], displayed holographic representations of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and the Death Star, and simulated a successful attack run on the station.
